#  Restore a Deleted RFI in Portfolio Financials 
#####  Legacy
This information is intended for accounts with [Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/) product in Procore. Please reach out to your Procore point of contact for more information.
##  Background 
The RFIs page in the Bid Room is a powerful tool that allows you to manage RFIs from your vendors and keep information consistent across all bidders. If an RFI was deleted, you can choose to restore it if necessary.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Limited' access to the project or higher.  
_Note:_ Users with 'Limited' access must be on the Bid Room Team for the project.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the relevant **Bid Room**.
  2. Click the **RFIs** tab.
  3. Locate the deleted RFI that you want to restore.
  4. Click **Restore**.  
  
![Restore Rfi](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a7d3be3074eb1c0b1e88c728f2a9e57c/e85edf6fc6b8bc619dad0774f82a04a2/restore-rfi.png?fm=webp)  
  
_Note:_ The RFI is immediately restored and will no longer show as crossed out.


## See Also
  * [Portfolio Financials - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/permissions)
  * [Delete an RFI in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/delete-an-rfi-in-portfolio-financials)
  * [Edit an RFI in Portfolio Financials](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/portfolio-financials/tutorials/edit-an-rfi-in-portfolio-financials)
title: Restore a Deleted RFI in Portfolio Financials
description: How to restore an RFI that was deleted in a Bid Room in Portfolio Financials.
